title: Enforce Studio Rpc Eventhub Topology
forbids: a daemon entrypoint that no longer mounts createStudioRpcHandler(context)
why: The daemon mounts Studio RPC; EventHub lifecycle belongs inside the Studio runtime context.
remediate: Keep the daemon mounting createStudioRpcHandler(context). EventHub lifecycle leaks are owned by prohibit_studio_rpc_eventhub_lifecycle_leaks.
message: Studio daemon no longer mounts the RPC handler through runtime context.
